description.en: Attacks an enemy.\nThis attack prioritizes the enemies' Front Line.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは、一番前の敵を優先的に攻撃する。
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n이 스킬은 전열의 적을 우선적으로 공격합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人。\n该技能优先攻击处于前排的敌人。

description.en: (Triggered Effect)\nWhen the caster is attacked, <color=#28d9ed>counterattacks</color>.\nInflicts <color=#28d9ed>Marked</color> on the target and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of minions by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.
description.jp: (発動効果)\n自分が攻撃を受けた場合、<color=#28d9ed>反撃</color>する。\n対象に<color=#28d9ed>標的</color>を付与し、自分を除く味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。
description.kr: (발동 효과)\n자신이 공격받았을 때 <color=#28d9ed>반격</color>합니다.\n대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>표식</color>을 부여하고 부하들의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 증가합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n自身受到攻击时,发动<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>。\n对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>标记</color>效果,并使部下们的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy.\nThis skill prioritizes the enemies' Front Line.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、大ダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは、一番前の敵を優先的に攻撃する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하여 큰 피해를 입힙니다.\n이 스킬은 전열의 적을 우선적으로 공격합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人并造成巨额伤害。\n该技能优先攻击处于前排的敌人。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nRecovers Health of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color>回復する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n자신의 턴마다 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color> 만큼 회복합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使自身生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color>。

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
Increases <color=#28d9ed>Attack and Speed</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>12.5%</color> every turn. (Max 8 stacks)

Increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>12%</color> when an ally attacks.
When an ally other than Sofia dies, does not take Weakness Gauge damage, recovers <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> of the remaining allies by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> and increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>, but reduces their <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.

Minions have special abilities that are stackable and removed upon their deaths.
<color=#ffd732>Nightwatch Shieldbearer</color>: Reduces <color=#28d9ed>damage taken</color> by all allies by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
<color=#ffd732>Nightwatch Waraxe-Wielder</color>: Reduces <color=#28d9ed>damage taken</color> by Idith and Nightwatch Waraxe-Wielder by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
毎ターン味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力とスピード</color>が<color=#28d9ed>12.5%</color>UPする。この効果は最大8回まで累積する。

味方が攻撃時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>12%</color>UPする。
味方が倒れた時、WGダメージを受けず、残った味方の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>回復し、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPさせるが、<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>は<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>DOWNする。

部下には特殊能力があり、倒れた時解除される。
<color=#ffd732>【騎士団兵〈盾〉】</color>:味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>受けるダメージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>DOWNさせる。
<color=#ffd732>【騎士団兵〈斧〉】</color>:【イディス】と【騎士団兵〈斧〉】の<color=#28d9ed>受けるダメージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
매 턴 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력과 속도</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>12.5%</color> 증가합니다. (최대 8회 누적)

아군이 공격 시 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>12%</color> 증가합니다.
소피아를 제외한 아군 사망 시 WG 피해를 받지 않고, 남은 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 회복시키고 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 증가시키지만, <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해</color>는 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 감소합니다.

부하들은 서로 누적되는 특수 능력을 보유하며 사망 시 해제됩니다.
<color=#ffd732>기사단 실드</color> : 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>받는 피해</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 감소시킵니다. 
<color=#ffd732>기사단 워액스</color> : 이디스와 기사단 워액스의 <color=#28d9ed>받는 피해</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
(被动效果)
每回合使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力和速度</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>12.5%</color>。(最多可叠加8次)

友军进行攻击时,使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>12%</color>。
除索菲雅外的友军死亡时,不会受到WG伤害,并使剩余友军的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>,且使<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>,但使<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。

使部下们附带互相叠加的特殊能力,并在死亡时解除。
<color=#ffd732>骑士团盾牌兵</color>:使全体友军<color=#28d9ed>所受伤害</color>降低
<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
<color=#ffd732>骑士团战斧兵</color>:使伊蒂斯和骑士团战斧兵<color=#28d9ed>所受伤害</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。
